name: Saltine Candy W/Chocolate and Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Line up the saltines on a jelly roll pan lined with foil, creating 5 rows of 8.
2. Melt the butter and add the light brown sugar. Stir often until it reaches a full rolling boil for exactly 3 minutes.
3. Pour the mixture over the saltines and bake in a 400°F oven for 5 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and wait until they are almost melted, then spread evenly over all the saltines.
5. Drop the chopped nuts over top as evenly as possible.
6. Refrigerate for two hours before breaking into pieces.
7. Store in a tin. Aunt Betty says you don't have to worry about storing—they'll never last.
